meeting_summary.context: string — 2-3 sentences on what this meeting is and why it matters
meeting_summary.headline: string — the single most important thing to know, in one sentence
meeting_summary.participant_snapshot: string — who's in the room and what they want

risks.risk: string — the specific thing that could go wrong
risks.evidence: string — citation to source, e.g., 'Notes p.3' or 'Slide 7'
risks.mitigation: string — concrete action the user can take before/during the meeting

talking_points.angle: string — the specific point to make
talking_points.why_it_lands: string — why this point matters to the counterparty specifically

next_steps.action: string — the thing to be done
next_steps.dependency: string | null — what this waits on, if anything

cover_image_prompt: string — prompt for an image generator, describing a header image appropriate to the meeting
